title: Boot Configuration Change for Persistence
description: Detects BCDEdit commands that modify boot configuration for safe mode persistence.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*\\bcdedit.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*safeboot*' or 'Command Line' like '*bootstatuspolicy*')))

tests.test_name: UEFI Persistence via Wpbbin.exe File Creation
